title: Preserve public contract boundaries
description: Keep BUDGET versioned, channel-neutral, and dependent only on public LEDGER contracts while exposing a stable read projection to INSIGHTS.
target: 100% of Public Budget Operations publish deterministic versioned request, result, error, exit, authority, mutability, idempotency, limit, and compatibility metadata; zero private LEDGER storage or implementation references; every unsupported BUDGET, LEDGER, or INSIGHTS version fails before mutation or partial financial output.
load_condition: Every public operation and every supported or one-version-incompatible producer-consumer contract pairing.
measurement: Schema snapshots, compatibility matrices, dependency-boundary compilation tests, and contract tests for Agent Host, LEDGER, and INSIGHTS seams.
rationale: Downstream design must not turn a local module boundary into private coupling or an implicit UI contract.
